Who We Are

More Than a Staffing Firm.
We Are Your People Partner.

Since 2009, CNT Promo & Ads Specialists, Inc. has been the employment and staffing agency of choice for hundreds of corporations, government institutions, and SMEs across the Philippines. We don't just fill positions — we architect winning teams.

Our dedicated recruitment professionals combine deep industry knowledge with a rigorous vetting process to deliver candidates who not only have the skills your business demands, but the character and cultural fit to thrive within your organization.

Rigorous Talent Vetting Multi-stage assessment including skills testing, background verification, and behavioral profiling.
Speed Without Compromise 72-hour shortlist turnaround for standard roles, with dedicated rush-hire protocols available.
Nationwide Talent Network A vetted pool of over 50,000 active candidates across all major Philippine cities and provinces.
Partner With Us
What We Offer

End-to-End Workforce Solutions

From sourcing a single C-suite executive to deploying a team of 500 — we have the expertise, network, and process to deliver.

Executive Search

We identify and secure high-caliber C-suite, director, and senior management talent through a discreet, research-driven headhunting methodology.

Engage Us →
01

Mass & Bulk Hiring

Large-scale recruitment campaigns managed from job posting to onboarding — scaling your workforce rapidly without sacrificing candidate quality.

Engage Us →
02

HR Outsourcing

Full-service HR function management — from recruitment and onboarding to performance management, labor compliance, and employee relations.

Engage Us →
03

Contractual Staffing

Project-based, seasonal, and contractual workforce deployment — fully managed engagement including payroll, benefits, and labor law compliance.

Engage Us →
04

Background Screening

Comprehensive pre-employment verification — educational credentials, employment history, character references, and national clearance processing.

Engage Us →
05

Training & Development

Customized learning interventions — onboarding programs, leadership development, skills upgrading, and corporate culture integration workshops.

Engage Us →
06
Why CNT

The Partner That Delivers,
Not Just Promises.

In the Philippines' competitive talent market, the difference between success and a costly mis-hire is the quality of your recruitment partner. CNT's proven methodology and dedicated account managers ensure your hiring outcomes exceed expectations — every single engagement.

How We Work

From Brief to Best Hire

01

Discovery Call

We invest time understanding your organization's culture, values, role requirements, and the success profile of your ideal candidate.

02

Talent Search & Screening

Our recruiters activate the talent network, run multi-stage assessments, and deliver a curated shortlist within 72 hours.

03

Interview & Selection

We coordinate and facilitate interviews, provide objective candidate evaluations, and support final selection with data-driven insights.

04

Onboarding & Retention

We manage the offer process, pre-employment documentation, and provide 90-day post-placement monitoring to ensure lasting success.
